fields.title: Remove legacy Ralph and autoresearch runtime surfaces and add explicit import-or-fail-fast handling
fields.description:
Complete the redesign by deleting the old steady-state runtime surfaces and making legacy handling explicit.

Remove steady-state runtime dependency on:
- .pi/ralph/** as live storage
- .autoresearch/**
- autoresearch.jsonl
- autoresearch.md
- autoresearch.ideas.md
- autoresearch.program.md
- autoresearch.config.json
- init_experiment/run_experiment/log_experiment
- mode-style /autoresearch behavior

If legacy migration support is needed, implement it as an explicit one-shot importer into .pi/loops/**. Do not keep dual-read runtime logic, fallback storage lookup, alias tools, or silent compatibility repair paths.
